title: corysanthes rotundifolia
intro: Corysanthes rotundifolia, also known as round-leaved Corysanthes, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic, to help increase urine production and relieve urinary tract issues. The health benefits of Corysanthes rotundifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Corysanthes rotundifolia is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
